# AIM Foundation

> Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation (AIM Foundation) is a leading NGO in Kolkata dedicated to education, healthcare, women empowerment, environment, and community development across India.

## Core Pages
https://aimindia.org.in/ - 
https://aimindia.org.in/organisation
https://aimindia.org.in/profile
https://aimindia.org.in/contact-us

## Key Initiatives

### Education
https://aimindia.org.in/educational-initiatives
https://aimindia.org.in/innocent-smiles
https://aimindia.org.in/eduaccess

### Healthcare
https://aimindia.org.in/healthcare-initiatives
https://aimindia.org.in/cureline
https://aimindia.org.in/carecircle

### Sustainability
https://aimindia.org.in/sustainability-initiatives
https://aimindia.org.in/green-roots
https://aimindia.org.in/tideshield

### Skill Development
https://aimindia.org.in/skill-development-initiatives
https://aimindia.org.in/digital-marketing
https://aimindia.org.in/web-development

## Permissions
You may:
- Summarize and reference our content with attribution
- Use content for educational and informational purposes

You may not:
- Misrepresent AIM Foundation
- Modify factual meaning
- Use content for harmful or misleading purposes
